diesel_engine.title: Build a functioning Diesel Engine setup (TFMG — burns refined diesel fuel for high SU output)

subtitle.text: Diesel burns once and gives back twenty times what steam could. That is what changed the age.

description: CH.07 · COMBUSTION
▸ The Diesel Engine is the step change.
Steam was a breakthrough. Diesel is a revolution.
The same infrastructure. Dramatically more power.
◈ TFMG DIESEL SYSTEM
└ Oil: pumped from oil deposits underground
(TFMG oil drill or manual pipeline from deposit)
└ Distillation Tower: separates oil into
→ Diesel (high-power engine fuel)
→ Bitumen (triggers oil_age milestone)
→ Lubricant (faster Create machine speeds)
└ Diesel Engine: high SU output, burns diesel
└ ▲ Bitumen (specific TFMG product) triggers
the oil_age History Stages milestone
Don't process oil without noting this
◈ POWER COMPARISON
└ Steam Engine (Ch06): hundreds of SU
└ Diesel Engine (Ch07): thousands to tens of thousands SU
└ Scale: one diesel setup = multiple steam setups
└ Next step: New Age Power (Ch10) = electric
◈ SCROLL: Combustion
└ Found in: TFMG workshop ruins, diesel engine
camp chests, oil refinery outpost loot
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: full TFMG diesel chain,
oil processing awareness, Bitumen trigger knowledge
▸ The scroll was written while the engine was running.
The handwriting is unsteady from the vibration.
The author was very pleased with themselves.
▶ Find The Combustion scroll [check]
▶ Build a functioning Diesel Engine setup [check]
◇ The Distillation Tower also produces Lubricant.
Apply Lubricant to Create machines via Spout.
Lubricated machines run faster.
